programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Simon Gregson. An action-packed investigation that leaves Simon and the team's minds blown when the terrifying evidence points to a dark and murderous past. S2, Ep4

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Jake Quickenden. In a highly emotional case, the team not only try to contact Jake's late father and brother but also discover Jake was once a civil war solder in a past life. S2, Ep5
Teleshopping.
Big changes are afoot for Drew in Conwy. He hunts for fresh stock in a stunning 1730s Sussex mansion, and in Lincoln he spots an unusual 19th century medical cabinet. S17, Ep2
Modern day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the UK in search of weird and wonderful objects. The bigger the hoard, the happier he is. S17, Ep3
A woman plans to move from California to the Norfolk coast. She has a budget of £250,000 to spend on a beautiful property she can call her forever home. S7, Ep10

Drew's son Tom is keen to learn more about the trade. They visit Shepton Mallet Flea market in Somerset, where Tom spots a stunning painting. S17, Ep6
Drew's ability to work under pressure is tested by talented dealer, Alasdair. In a disused church, Drew bids on an elaborate Victorian mirror. S17, Ep7
Experts Philip Serrell and Anita Manning travel to Driffield, Yorkshire, for the second leg of their road trip. Who will make the biggest profit? S12, Ep12

Upholsterer Sonnaz restores a well-loved rocking chair from 1851. Plus, musical restorer David works on a precious antique music box in the shape of a bear. S6, Ep15

Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help a woman on her journey across the world to find her birth mother. A father searches for his lost son. S10, Ep3
Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help sisters track down their brother. A woman searches Hong Kong for the mother who abandoned her. S10, Ep4
Selling Up Before Baby Comes. With just a month before her due date, Gem and Tom ask Angus to visit their 16th century Suffolk home. Plus, a retired couple needs help with a downsize. S4, Ep17
The UK's Biggest Collection. A couple with a collection of dishes asks Angus to sell them to fund a trip to Australia. Plus, Angus finds a huge fire engine part in a living room. S4, Ep18
Antiques experts travel the UK with a budget of £200 each in a competition to find and buy antiques or rare items and sell them for a profit. S25, Ep4
Fleur De Lis Mansion. Jordyn and Johnny's visit to a 1700s mansion in New Orleans' Garden District starts with a bang - and a ghost named Billy seems to be behind it. S2, Ep9
Footprints Of The Past. In Essex, a mysterious little footprint appears in wet paint whilst redecorating and the team capture a photograph of a young girl. Why is she there? S6, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Lady Colin Campbell. This reality TV star lives in the ominous Castle Goring. Plagued by activity, the team reveals a connection with a famous owner that shocks everyone! S2, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Paul Burrell. Princess Diana's former butler, Paul Burrell, reports ghostly noises and activity in his home. Could someone be contacting him from beyond the grave? S3, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Tina Malone. Tina Malone longs to be freed from a skeletal figure that has haunted her since childhood. But he's not the only one that's been following her. S3, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Paul Chuckle. Paul Chuckle feels his late brother Barry is close, but lurking in the dark is not a kindred spirit. The team find a sinister past to Paul's property. S3, Ep3
